concerns.text: Constitution Principle V (Versioning Discipline) requires artifact hashes stored in `state/projects/PROJ-552-quantifying-the-complexity-of-knot-diagr.yaml`, but plan.md only mentions `data/checksums.txt`. This is a direct constitutional violation per FR-030.

contracts/ directory lists knot_record.schema.yaml, invariants_dataset.schema.yaml, regression_model.schema.yaml, but plan.md does not reference contracts in any code/ module. Each contract should have a corresponding plan element (e.g., FR-002 should reference invariants_dataset.schema.yaml for validation).
CompositeComplexityScore entity defined in data-model.md but has no corresponding contract schema. Plan references complexity_weights.yaml for configuration, but no contract exists for this file.

data-model.md marks hyperbolic_volume as Required (Yes) with exclusiveMinimum: 0, but contracts/knot_data.schema.yaml defines it as nullable with minimum: 0. This contradicts the plan's FR-014 which filters knots with zero/undefined volume.

contracts/ contains knot_record.schema.yaml, knot_data.schema.yaml (duplicate entity definition), invariants_dataset.schema.yaml, regression_model.schema.yaml. Plan does not explain why two KnotRecord contracts exist or how they differ.
